inputs.label: Direction (1=Buy, -1=Sell)
inputs.businessContext: Indicates trade direction: 1 for long (buy), -1 for short (sell).

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates trade direction: 1 for long (buy), -1 for short (sell).

inputs.label: Entry Price
inputs.businessContext: The exchange rate at which the position was entered.

businessContext_i18n.en: The exchange rate at which the position was entered.

inputs.label: Exit Price
inputs.businessContext: The exchange rate at which the position was closed.

businessContext_i18n.en: The exchange rate at which the position was closed.

inputs.label: Lot Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of standard lots traded (1 lot = 100,000 units typically).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of standard lots traded (1 lot = 100,000 units typically).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlem gören standart lot sayısı (1 lot = genellikle 100.000 birim).

inputs.label: Pip Value per Lot
inputs.unit: account currency per pip per lot
inputs.businessContext: Monetary value of one pip movement for one standard lot in account currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monetary value of one pip movement for one standard lot in account currency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesap para biriminde bir standart lot için bir pip hareketinin parasal değeri.

inputs.label: Pip Size
inputs.businessContext: Smallest incremental price movement, typically 0.0001 except for JPY pairs (0.01).

businessContext_i18n.en: Smallest incremental price movement, typically 0.0001 except for JPY pairs (0.01).
businessContext_i18n.tr: En küçük artış fiyat hareketi, genellikle JPY çiftleri hariç 0.0001 (0.01).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
